message:
Command `
# 1h11m40s CPU / ~19.6min elapsed. Pipe still at 2333 bytes (no new content).
# The 0th iteration is still going (should complete around 19-21 min elapsed)
# Let me drain more aggressively
LIBPID=1100961

# Large drain - 16MB
dd if=/proc/$LIBPID/fd/11 bs=65536 count=256 >> /tmp/drt2_pipe.log 2>/dev/null &
PD=$!; sleep 3; kill $PD 2>/dev/null; wait $PD 2>/dev/null

wc -c /tmp/drt2_pipe.log
tail -12 /tmp/drt2_pipe.log

ORPID=$(ps aux | grep openroad | grep -v grep | awk '{print $2}' | head -1)
[ -n "$ORPID" ] && ps -p $ORPID -o cputime= 2>/dev/null
` executed with exit code 0.

# 1h11m40s CPU / ~19.6min elapsed. Pipe still at 2333 bytes (no new content).
